title: SAP role assignment and tile access issues
guidance: Check recent role assignment changes, Fiori catalog mapping, and identity sync status. For more than five affected users, route to identity/access support and request approval before changing roles.

title: CI pipeline failure after dependency update
guidance: Compare lockfile changes, inspect failing job logs, run dependency rollback test, and create a developer ticket with the failing workflow URL.

title: Read-only analytics dashboard access
guidance: Verify manager approval and assign the user to the read-only reporting group. Single-user low-risk requests can be prepared automatically but still require approval.

title: Suspicious login or credential risk
guidance: Escalate immediately to security operations. Do not auto-resolve. Preserve logs, lock risky sessions, and require human review.
